title: The Lay of Sigurd: Dragon-Slayer
description: Sigurd slays the dragon Fafnir, tastes its blood, and understands the speech of birds — the core myth behind the Nibelungenlied.
introduction: Sigurd slays the dragon Fafnir, tastes its blood, and understands the speech of birds — the core myth behind the Nibelungenlied.

translation.original_text: Sigurðr ok Reginn fóru upp á Gnitaheiði.
translation.text: Sigurd and Regin went up onto Gnita-heath.
